domain: Mongolian/Tuvan khoomei throat singing (singer hums fundamental + selectively amplifies harmonic overtones 6th-13th partial; kargyraa undertone half-fundamental; sygyt-style formant-merge filters single overtone; master judges audible deviation from clean overtone-against-fundamental signature)
specific_mechanism: KHOOMEI-PARTIAL-JUDGE: harmonic-partial-anchored multi-criteria LLM judge with fundamental-reference. (1) Per candidate output, extract gist embedding e_F (fundamental) + K harmonic partial-aspect projections {e_F + h_k · δ_k} where each partial-direction h_k corresponds to one rubric dimension (factuality, coherence, structure, completeness, citation-quality, calibration, ...). (2) LLM-judge scores each partial against fundamental-anchored rubric: deviation_k = ||predicted_partial − ideal_partial(e_F, k)|| via cosine + chain-of-thought rubric. (3) Aggregate gating: PASS only if ALL K partial-deviations < τ_clean AND ||e_F − e_F_reference|| < τ_F. (4) Defect localization: per-partial deviation_k identifies which dimension slipped. (5) Multi-criterion rubric tied to fundamental anchor, not free-floating dimensions.
llm_application: KHOOMEI-PARTIAL-JUDGE harmonic-partial-anchored multi-criteria LLM judge + fundamental-reference embedding + per-partial deviation rubric + all-K-pass conjunctive gating. Differs from R359 ETRUSCAN-HARUSPEX (liver-divination signature). R430 KINTSUGI-CRACK (gold-repair). R418 SUTARTINES-EVAL (different mechanism). R445 IFA-BINARY (16-orisha binary tree). R456 JHATOR-EXTERNAL-JUDGE (multi-stage tribunal). R466 ROMANI-KRIS (restorative panel). Differs from Prometheus 2026 (rubric-refinement decomposition — closest, but no fundamental anchor + per-partial harmonic structure). REVISEVAL (LLM-Judge calibration). Multi-Agent LLM Judge Cao 2025 (Sample-Selection + Eval + Rewrite). LLM-as-Judge Monte Carlo / Arize templates (multi-criteria scoring). Differs by FUNDAMENTAL-EMBEDDING ANCHOR + HARMONIC-PARTIAL DIMENSION PROJECTIONS + ALL-K-PASS CONJUNCTIVE GATING.
novelty_claim: Prometheus + REVISEVAL + Multi-Agent LLM Judge + Rubric-Refinement cover multi-criteria rubric-anchored LLM-Judge paradigm. KHOOMEI-PARTIAL-JUDGE adds (a) fundamental embedding anchor + (b) harmonic-partial dimension projection + (c) all-K-pass conjunctive gating. Recombination — borderline lookup.
